title: NyaBox
description: A kitchen sink modpack, that is mainly used by me and my friends to play together
body:
# Nyabox
**Reimagined Minecraft experience**
#

Current version includes:
- Tech mods such as EnderIO, Create, Mekanism, AE2 and Immersive Engineering
- Magic mods such as Hexalia, Malum, Mana and Artifice, and Enchanted
- Biome/Exploration  mods Regions Unexplored, and Ice and Fire
- Optimizations for the modded experience, mainly Embeddium
- Farming enhancements with Mystical Agriculture, Farmer's Delight and addons
- Vanilla Tweaks
- and much more...

A little bit for everybody



<details>
<summary>Current Minecraft Version: 1.20.1</summary>
Update to 1.21.1 is planned and is being worked on


</details>
